description: Our REST API lets you access to resources and perform actions on behalf of a store.

novel_features.name: Reputation summary
novel_features.description: One read-only dashboard for store-level review count, rating, shop metadata, settings, and local review stats.

novel_features.name: Product reputation hotspots
novel_features.description: Ranks synced products by low-rating rate, average rating, verified rate, and newest review recency.

novel_features.name: Moderation attention queue
novel_features.description: Surfaces low-rated, hidden, spam-marked, or not-yet-curated synced reviews for human attention.

novel_features.name: Trust settings audit
novel_features.description: Audits Judge.me settings that affect trust presentation, including autopublish, picture reviews, star color, and admin email presence when returned.

novel_features.name: Product evidence view
novel_features.description: Fetches product-level count/histogram evidence when product ID is known and widget availability/byte evidence for handles or external IDs.
